Package emissary.grpc.invoker

Class GrpcInvoker

    • emissary.grpc.invoker.GrpcInvoker

extends Object

      R      		 invoke​(org.apache.commons.pool2.ObjectPool<io.grpc.ManagedChannel> channelPool, Function<io.grpc.ManagedChannel,​S> stubFactory, BiFunction<S,​Q,​R> callLogic, Q request)
      Executes a unary gRPC call to a given endpoint using an AbstractBlockingStub.

    • Constructor Detail

      • GrpcInvoker

        public GrpcInvoker​(RetryHandler retryHandler)

    • Method Detail

      • invoke

        public <Q extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3,​R extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3,​S extends io.grpc.stub.AbstractBlockingStub<S>> R invoke​(org.apache.commons.pool2.ObjectPool<io.grpc.ManagedChannel> channelPool,
                                                                                                                                                                               Function<io.grpc.ManagedChannel,​S> stubFactory,
                                                                                                                                                                               BiFunction<S,​Q,​R> callLogic,
                                                                                                                                                                               Q request)
        Executes a unary gRPC call to a given endpoint using an AbstractBlockingStub. If the gRPC connection fails due to a PoolException or a ServiceNotAvailableException, the call will be tried again per the configurations set using RetryHandler. All other Exceptions are thrown on the spot. Will also throw an Exception once max attempts have been reached.
        Type Parameters:
        Q - the protobuf request type
        R - the protobuf response type
        S - the gRPC stub type
        Parameters:
        channelPool - object pool of gRPC connections for a given endpoint
        stubFactory - function that creates the appropriate gRPC stub from a ManagedChannel
        callLogic - function that performs the actual gRPC call using the stub and request
        request - the protobuf request message to send
        Returns:
        the response returned by the gRPC call

      • invokeAsync

        public <Q extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3,​R extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3,​S extends io.grpc.stub.AbstractFutureStub<S>> CompletableFuture<R> invokeAsync​(org.apache.commons.pool2.ObjectPool<io.grpc.ManagedChannel> channelPool,
                                                                                                                                                                                                     Function<io.grpc.ManagedChannel,​S> stubFactory,
                                                                                                                                                                                                     BiFunction<S,​Q,​com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<R>> callLogic,
                                                                                                                                                                                                     Q request)
        Executes a unary gRPC call to a given endpoint using an AbstractFutureStub. If the gRPC connection fails due to a PoolException or a ServiceNotAvailableException, the call will be tried again per the configurations set using RetryHandler. All other Exceptions are thrown on the spot. Will also throw an Exception once max attempts have been reached.
        Type Parameters:
        Q - the protobuf request type
        R - the protobuf response type
        S - the gRPC stub type
        Parameters:
        channelPool - object pool of gRPC connections for a given endpoint
        stubFactory - function that creates the appropriate gRPC stub from a ManagedChannel
        callLogic - function that performs the actual gRPC call using the stub and request
        request - the protobuf request message to send
        Returns:
        the future that waits for the response returned by the gRPC call

      • awaitAll

        public static <R> void awaitAll​(Collection<CompletableFuture<R>> futures)
        Waits for all provided asynchronous computations. This method blocks the calling thread until each CompletableFuture in the input has complete.
        Type Parameters:
        R - result type
        Parameters:
        futures - futures representing asynchronous computations

      • awaitAllAndGet

        public static <R,​C extends Collection<R>> C awaitAllAndGet​(Collection<CompletableFuture<R>> futures,
                                                                 Supplier<? extends C> factory)
        Waits for all provided asynchronous computations to complete and returns their results. This method blocks the calling thread until each CompletableFuture in the input has complete. If any future completes exceptionally, the corresponding CompletableFuture.join() call will throw a RuntimeException, and iteration will stop at that point.
        Type Parameters:
        R - result type
        C - collection type
        Parameters:
        futures - collection of futures representing asynchronous computations
        factory - creates the output collection instance
        Returns:
        a new collection of the results returned by the asynchronous computations

      • awaitAllAndGet

        public static <K,​R,​M extends Map<K,​R>> M awaitAllAndGet​(Map<K,​CompletableFuture<R>> futures,
                                                                          Supplier<? extends M> factory)
        Waits for all provided asynchronous computations to complete and returns their results. This method blocks the calling thread until each CompletableFuture in the input has complete. If any future completes exceptionally, the corresponding CompletableFuture.join() call will throw a RuntimeException, and iteration will stop at that point.
        Type Parameters:
        K - key type
        R - result type
        M - map type
        Parameters:
        futures - map of keys to futures representing asynchronous computations
        factory - creates the output map instance
        Returns:
        a new map of keys to the results returned by the asynchronous computations
